changes: Normalized apostille `issuing_authority` commas so California line 7 parses as `Deputy Secretary of State, State of California` instead of collapsing the comma-space boundary.
Backfilled `apostille_california_001.issuing_authority` into the pending-review label and external holdout expected payload because the source image visibly contains the value.

Added `evals/external_holdout/case_annotations.json` and surfaced `field_observations` through the holdout manifest/expected payloads so remaining partial fields are explicitly marked as blank, redacted, or truncated on the source document.

tests.ruff: PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/ruff check scripts/evals/build_external_holdout.py src/hanah_tax_ocr/normalization.py tests/test_parsers.py tests/test_external_holdout.py

treating `residency_legacy_001` missing TIN/date tokens as annotatable fields without source evidence

next_priorities: Add at least one reviewed withholding front-side sample outside current eval so address/applicant_name/middle_name/date recognizer candidates can gain non-zero val coverage.
